drift_policy: If the SHA changes: (1) decide whether the change is intentional and whether it breaks the public-report contract; (2) if breaking, bump PUBLIC_SCHEMA_VERSION (semver MAJOR/MINOR per docs/schema_versioning.md), append an additive_fields_introduced entry, write a CHANGELOG entry plus an ADR; (3) if non-breaking (cosmetic docstring, type-only refactor) just update the SHA. Producer/consumer roundtrip pin lives in tests/test_public_schema_pin.py.
notes: Companion to ml/schemas/v1_input_schema.json (C10 input schema). This pin protects the *public* calibration report contract (consumed by the dashboard + the freeze_exit gate).
